mapper.sql: id, merchant_id, category_id, name, price, original_price, image, description, stock, sales, rating, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM biz_dish WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_dish (merchant_id, category_id, name, price, original_price, image, description, stock, sales, rating, status) VALUES (#{merchantId}, #{categoryId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{image}, #{description}, #{stock}, #{sales}, #{rating}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_dish SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
